mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_ID as "boardId", BOARD_TYPE as "boardType", TITLE as "title", CONTENT as "content", CRET_USER_ID as "cretUserId", to_char(CRET_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as "cretDt", to_char(UPDT_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as "updtDt", VIEW_CNT as "viewCnt" FROM TB_BOARD WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BOARD (BOARD_ID, BOARD_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, CRET_USER_ID, CRET_DT, VIEW_CNT) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{boardType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{cretUserId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOARD SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, UPDT_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
UPDATE TB_BOARD SET VIEW_CNT = VIEW_CNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId}
mapper.select: SELECT COMMENT_ID as "commentId", BOARD_ID as "boardId", CONTENT as "content", CRET_USER_ID as "cretUserId", to_char(CRET_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') as "cretDt" FROM TB_BOARD_COMMENT WHERE BOARD_ID = #{boardId} ORDER BY CRET_DT ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BOARD_COMMENT (COMMENT_ID, BOARD_ID, CONTENT, CRET_USER_ID, CRET_DT) VALUES (#{commentId}, #{boardId}, #{content}, #{cretUserId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
